section_analysis.description: Slow, ambient intro. Focus on 'Cold Rain' and 'Blue Scars'. Atmospheric reverb-heavy guitar.
Breathy emotional peak. Focus on 'Fading' and 'Clinging'. High emotional resonance with slow tempo.

lyrics.original: 降り注いだ冷たい雨 青い傷を溶かしてった。
lyrics.romaji: Furisosoida tsumetai ame aoi kizu wo tokashitetta.
lyrics.meta: Opening line. Core weather-metaphor for grief.

lyrics.original: 夕暮れの涙が出そうな赤 私の中の君を溶かしてしまえ。
lyrics.romaji: Yuugure no namida ga desou na aka watashi no naka no kimi wo tokashite shimae.
lyrics.meta: Chorus peak. Twilight imagery symbolizing fading memory.

stylistic_dna.vocal_texture: Hatsune Miku Dark - Breathy, fragile, crying quality
stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Ambient Electric Guitar, Slow Rock Drums, Subdued Piano
signature_phrases: 消えて 消してよ (Please fade away, erase it)
